creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->patched

Note that a fix exists in -CURRENT for the IDE problem, and needs to be 
MFCed. 

Note to submitter: it is most useful to file different PRs for problems 
that are probably not related.  Since xorg has just changed completely, 
this part of your problem needs to be re-tested on the latest codebase.
